brief_notes: Covers the same findings but tables lack quantitative precision. The model selection table uses 'Higher/Lower/Lowest' instead of actual AIC values. The condition-specific results table uses 'Sig. (+)' and 'n.s.' instead of beta coefficients and p-values. The lateralization table lacks the mean LV values and t-statistics. The discussion is quite detailed and well-written. The introduction provides good context but is somewhat lengthy. Overall the paper conveys findings qualitatively rather than quantitatively.
